pages.text: $(o)"If daylight will not shelter us, let darkness do it."$()$(br2)Used by rebels in the Old Uprising. Thirty successful infiltrations of light-keep fortresses, zero casualties.

pages.title: Effect
pages.text: Within $(l)30 blocks$():$(br)· All $(l)players$() gain Invisibility (30s)$(br)· All $(l)hostiles$() are Blinded (10s)$(br2)Cost: $(l)3200$() mana.

pages.title: Tactics
pages.text: Infiltrate, retreat, ambush — three uses one scroll.$(br2)Invisibility is potion-style: armor doesn't break it.$(br2)Recommended: $(l)Tier 3 Convergence$() or above.
